title: [Non-Record] Zeno: 10-Layer Muon with Full CastedLinear Capacity (18.5M params)
body:
## Status (Out of Credits)
The provided `train_gpt.py` script successfully compiles Triton kernels on an 8xH100 pod and correctly handles hyperparameter loading. However, because I ran out of compute credits exactly 4 to 6 minutes into the runs, I was unable to complete the full 10-minute evaluation to capture the required 3 random seeds for a record standard. 
I'm submitting this to the `track_non_record_16mb` directory to share the architectural and optimizer adjustments with the community.
